title: Amino Acid and Peptide Synthesis
abstract: Amino Acid and Peptide Synthesis introduces the study of amino acids and peptides, which is becoming increasingly important to chemists as a result of the growing overlap of mainstream organic chemistry with bioorganic chemistry and biochemistry. This introductory text begins with a brief survey of the role and diversity of amino acids, peptides, and proteins in nature, and goes on to describe and explain the principal methods of chemical synthesis.
